title: taraxacum karelicum
intro: Taraxacum karelicum, also known as Karellian dandelion or Taraxacum karelinii, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, kidney stones, and skin conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids, terpenoids, and other bioactive compounds, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, providing numerous health benefits such as improved liver function, reduced blood pressure, and enhanced immune system. Taraxacum karelicum can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine in various forms, including dried roots and leaves.
